mapper.select: SELECT record_date, SUM(carbon_reduction) AS total_carbon FROM behavior_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY record_date
SELECT * FROM behavior_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{today} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM behavior_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY record_date, create_time DESC
SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(carbon_reduction) AS totalCarbon FROM behavior_record WHERE record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY totalCarbon DESC
